hooks.command:
jq -n --arg branch "$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo unknown)" --arg status "$(git status --short 2>/dev/null | head -20 || echo '  (clean)')" --arg commits "$(git log --oneline -5 2>/dev/null | sed 's/^/  /')" --arg files "$(ls -1 2>/dev/null | sed 's/^/  /')" '{systemMessage: ("🌟 thai-stock-analyzer — Session Info

📌 Branch: " + $branch + "

📋 Git Status:
" + (if $status == "" then "  (clean)" else $status end) + "

🕐 Recent Commits (last 5):
" + $commits + "

📁 Root Files:
" + $files)}'
